LLM4Code 2025
  • 🤖 The Second International Workshop on Large Language Models for Code
  • 💼 Co-Located with ICSE 2025
  • 🧭 Ottawa, Ontario, Canada
  • 📅 Sun 27 April --- Sat 3 May 2025
  • 📅 Follow us on Twitter: @llm4code!
  • Past Workshops: 2024
